aeo_readiness.summary: AI assistants are unlikely to cite this business due to inconsistent NAP data, lack of conversational content, and minimal authority signals. The business risks being overlooked in AI-driven search results.
quick_wins: Update NAP data to ensure consistency across all platforms.
Implement FAQ content to address common customer queries.

gbp_analysis.summary: The Google Business Profile is operational with positive ratings but has critical inconsistencies in contact information.
critical_issues: Phone number mismatch between GBP and website.
Lack of regular posts or Q&A engagement.

nap_citations.summary: NAP consistency is moderate, with a critical phone number mismatch impacting reliability.
action_items: Update the website phone number to match GBP: (213) 658-6100.
Audit and correct NAP data across all online directories.

schema_gaps: No HowTo schema for service explanations

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Inconsistent NAP data and lack of structured content make the business less visible to AI.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Queries related to 'HVAC services in Pasadena, CA' and 'emergency HVAC repair near me'.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Implementing LocalBusiness schema and ensuring NAP consistency.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Highlighting certifications, licenses, and customer testimonials to establish expertise.

agency_pitch.hook: Unlock AI-driven leads by fixing your NAP and enhancing your content strategy.
agency_pitch.pain_point: Inconsistent data and lack of conversational content mean lost opportunities with AI search users.
agency_pitch.proof_point: The phone number mismatch and absence of FAQ content directly impact AI citation potential.
agency_pitch.solution: Our AEO approach optimizes NAP data, implements structured schema, and creates conversational content to align with AI search trends.
agency_pitch.impact_estimate: Expect a 30-40% increase in AI-driven leads within the first 3 months.
agency_pitch.urgency: Competitors optimizing for AI search are capturing market share—act now to stay competitive.

email_subject_line: Boost Your AI Visibility: Fix Your NAP & Content Strategy Today!
opening_line: We analyzed your website and Google Business Profile and identified key areas to enhance your AI search presence.
cta: Let's schedule a call to discuss our findings and how we can help you optimize for AI-driven search.
